subtitle: Two west-facing sand coves on Ibiza's Sant Josep coast, looking across shallow turquoise water to the protected islets of Ponent.
spike_statement: The shallows run clear turquoise over white sand because currents flush the bay constantly, and three protected islets stand offshore on the line of Ibiza's most-watched sunset.

levers.photo_tone: shallow turquoise grading to cobalt over pale sand, the islets as flat dark silhouettes against a low west sun
